item.title: A slight doc rephrasing for clarity, suggested in the forum. (tags: trunk)
item.description: A slight doc rephrasing for clarity, suggested in the forum. (tags: trunk)
item.dc:creator: stephan

item.title: Doc typo fixes from [forum:0bce273669 | forum post 0bce273669]. (tags: trunk)
item.description: Doc typo fixes from [forum:0bce273669 | forum post 0bce273669]. (tags: trunk)
item.dc:creator: stephan

item.title: *MERGE* Expose the column metadata APIs to WASM (which does not require a non-default sqlite3.c build, contrary to my prior mistaken claims). This adds only 424 bytes to sqlite3.wasm and 660 bytes to sqlite3.js. (tags: trunk)
item.description: *MERGE* Expose the column metadata APIs to WASM (which does not require a non-default sqlite3.c build, contrary to my prior mistaken claims). This adds only 424 bytes to sqlite3.wasm and 660 bytes to sqlite3.js. (tags: trunk)
item.dc:creator: stephan

item.title: Extend the pedantic enforcement of type in STRICT tables to cover VIRTUAL columns. (tags: trunk)
item.description: Extend the pedantic enforcement of type in STRICT tables to cover VIRTUAL columns. (tags: trunk)
item.dc:creator: drh

item.title: Enforce judgmental typing on STORED generated columns for STRICT tables. [forum:/forumpost/6caf195248a849e4|Forum post 6caf195248]. (tags: trunk)
item.description: Enforce judgmental typing on STORED generated columns for STRICT tables. [forum:/forumpost/6caf195248a849e4|Forum post 6caf195248]. (tags: trunk)
item.dc:creator: drh

item.title: Export the column-metadata APIs to WASM. <s>Doing so requires a non-default build of sqlite3.c, so this is a proof-of-concept branch saved just in case SQLITE_ENABLE_COLUMN_METADATA ever becomes the default for sqlite3.c.</s> Edit: that was a misunderstanding on my part. This build increases the .wasm file by only 424 bytes and the JS by 660, so there's no blocker to merging this. (tags: wasm-column-metadata)
item.description: Export the column-metadata APIs to WASM. <s>Doing so requires a non-default build of sqlite3.c, so this is a proof-of-concept branch saved just in case SQLITE_ENABLE_COLUMN_METADATA ever becomes the default for sqlite3.c.</s> Edit: that was a misunderstanding on my part. This build increases the .wasm file by only 424 bytes and the JS by 660, so there's no blocker to merging this. (tags: wasm-column-metadata)
item.dc:creator: stephan

item.title: Add the --enable-column-metadata flag to the configure script (off by default). It's only available in the canonical build, not the autoconf build, because it changes how sqlite3.c gets generated. (tags: trunk)
item.description: Add the --enable-column-metadata flag to the configure script (off by default). It's only available in the canonical build, not the autoconf build, because it changes how sqlite3.c gets generated. (tags: trunk)
item.dc:creator: stephan

item.title: Eliminate configure/build discrepancies in how 'make tclextension-...' works vs other makefile-side handling of the extension, conforming to the former. (tags: trunk)
item.description: Eliminate configure/build discrepancies in how 'make tclextension-...' works vs other makefile-side handling of the extension, conforming to the former. (tags: trunk)
item.dc:creator: stephan

item.title: Change the definition of SQLITE_DYNAMIC to a function that has exactly the same type as sqlite3_destructor_type, in an effort to work around possible legacy compiler bugs. (tags: trunk)
item.description: Change the definition of SQLITE_DYNAMIC to a function that has exactly the same type as sqlite3_destructor_type, in an effort to work around possible legacy compiler bugs. (tags: trunk)
item.dc:creator: drh

item.title: Add the --tclConfig.sh FILE flag to buildtclext.tcl to eliminate the discrepancy between the configure-time-detected tclConfig.sh and the one auto-detected by the tclextension family of makefile targets. Add the tclextension-all target to run all of the various tclextension-... targets in their natural order to facilitate testing changes like this one. Update the --help text to note that --with-tclsh should only be used if there's a specific need, and that --with-tcl is generall preferred. This is in response to [https://github.com/termux/termux-packages/issues/23268 | Termux ticket 23268]. (tags: trunk)
item.description: Add the --tclConfig.sh FILE flag to buildtclext.tcl to eliminate the discrepancy between the configure-time-detected tclConfig.sh and the one auto-detected by the tclextension family of makefile targets. Add the tclextension-all target to run all of the various tclextension-... targets in their natural order to facilitate testing changes like this one. Update the --help text to note that --with-tclsh should only be used if there's a specific need, and that --with-tcl is generall preferred. This is in response to [https://github.com/termux/termux-packages/issues/23268 | Termux ticket 23268]. (tags: trunk)
item.dc:creator: stephan

item.title: tea: remove the vsatisfies 8.6- enforcement from the extension because at least one platform with tcl 8.6 is inexplicably failing it. [forum:fde857fb8101a4be | Forum post fde857fb8101a4be] (tags: trunk)
item.description: tea: remove the vsatisfies 8.6- enforcement from the extension because at least one platform with tcl 8.6 is inexplicably failing it. [forum:fde857fb8101a4be | Forum post fde857fb8101a4be] (tags: trunk)
item.dc:creator: stephan

item.title: Avoid writing frames with no checksums into the wal file if a savepoint is rolled back after dirty pages have already been spilled into the wal file. Also fix a corner case in the previous check-in on this branch. (tags: branch-3.50)
item.description: Avoid writing frames with no checksums into the wal file if a savepoint is rolled back after dirty pages have already been spilled into the wal file. Also fix a corner case in the previous check-in on this branch. (tags: branch-3.50)
item.dc:creator: drh

item.title: *MERGE* Avoid writing frames with no checksums into the wal file if a savepoint is rolled back after dirty pages have already been spilled into the wal file. (tags: trunk)
item.description: *MERGE* Avoid writing frames with no checksums into the wal file if a savepoint is rolled back after dirty pages have already been spilled into the wal file. (tags: trunk)
item.dc:creator: drh

item.title: Fix a corner-case for [9441fff52cc4e19c]. (tags: trunk)
item.description: Fix a corner-case for [9441fff52cc4e19c]. (tags: trunk)
item.dc:creator: drh

item.title: Update walcksum.test so that it works with SQLITE_DEFAULT_AUTOVACUUM=1 builds. (tags: forum-b490f726db-fix)
item.description: Update walcksum.test so that it works with SQLITE_DEFAULT_AUTOVACUUM=1 builds. (tags: forum-b490f726db-fix)
item.dc:creator: dan

item.title: Extend [b5c6cb13cff5] to use a wildcard on darwin* because some OSes report a version number in the suffix. [forum:0c4bbc2962dfb06e | Forum post 0c4bbc2962dfb06e]. (tags: trunk)
item.description: Extend [b5c6cb13cff5] to use a wildcard on darwin* because some OSes report a version number in the suffix. [forum:0c4bbc2962dfb06e | Forum post 0c4bbc2962dfb06e]. (tags: trunk)
item.dc:creator: stephan

item.title: *MERGE* Minor proj.tcl portability fixes and cleanups suggested in [forum:7b218c3c9f|forum post 7b218c3c9f]. Tested on Linux, Msys, Cygwin, and Haiku. (tags: trunk)
item.description: *MERGE* Minor proj.tcl portability fixes and cleanups suggested in [forum:7b218c3c9f|forum post 7b218c3c9f]. Tested on Linux, Msys, Cygwin, and Haiku. (tags: trunk)
item.dc:creator: stephan

item.title: proj.tcl portability fixes and cleanups suggested in [forum:7b218c3c9f|forum post 7b218c3c9f]. Branching so that it can be tested on msys/cygwin/haiku before committing to it. (tags: linux-named-apple)
item.description: proj.tcl portability fixes and cleanups suggested in [forum:7b218c3c9f|forum post 7b218c3c9f]. Branching so that it can be tested on msys/cygwin/haiku before committing to it. (tags: linux-named-apple)
item.dc:creator: stephan

item.title: Avoid writing frames with no checksums into the wal file if a savepoint is rolled back after dirty pages have already been spilled into the wal file. Possible fix for [forum:/forumpost/b490f726db | forum post b490f726db]. (tags: forum-b490f726db-fix)
item.description: Avoid writing frames with no checksums into the wal file if a savepoint is rolled back after dirty pages have already been spilled into the wal file. Possible fix for [forum:/forumpost/b490f726db | forum post b490f726db]. (tags: forum-b490f726db-fix)
item.dc:creator: dan

item.title: Fix an issue going back to version 3.39.0 with transitive IS constraints in queries that make use of RIGHT JOIN. (tags: branch-3.50)
item.description: Fix an issue going back to version 3.39.0 with transitive IS constraints in queries that make use of RIGHT JOIN. (tags: branch-3.50)
item.dc:creator: drh
